releases.title: Financial year filter
changes: Add quick Financial Year selectors (1 Apr to 31 Mar) on KPI detail date range.

releases.title: Route fix
changes: Fix Create KPI 404 by registering kpis/create before kpis/{kpi}.

releases.title: Favicon update
changes: Replace site favicon with KPI brand icon.

releases.title: Deploy fix
changes: Commit Vite production build assets so shared hosting can load CSS/JS without running npm.

releases.title: Initial 2.0 release
changes: DSI KPI Monitoring System baseline release.
KPI formulas, feed history, date-range filters, and progress charts.
Projects, task list, task board, and quick access.
Role-based access for Super Admin, Admin, and User.
Software versioning and Super Admin changelog.
